name: Path Equivalence: '/multiple/trailing/slash//'
description: The product does not properly handle paths with multiple trailing slashes, which filesystems typically strip during resolution, allowing attackers to bypass access controls that check the slash-suffixed form differently from the canonical form.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with multiple trailing slashes that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't strip trailing slashes before comparison, while the OS normalizes them at STORAGE[file_access]
